reviews.review_msg: You're in good hands with Jose. He excels at "improv" (answering questions, spontaneous examples, etc). When he reads off the slides it can be boring, but he tries engaging the class. If it's not clear the first time, ask him, he does a good job clarifying. I read the textbook but slides were sufficient. Know the formulas and do his practice sets!!
Really easy going guy. Get yourself prepared by doing all the problem set+reading the slides will just bring you above the average! Real gem
